script.text_block: The computers on the <yellow>Voyager 1 spacecraft</yellow> possess only sixty-nine kilobytes of memory. That is hundreds of thousands of times less capacity than a <red>standard car key fob</red> today.

script.yt_search_query: greek philosopher statue head close up
script.text_block: Control your thoughts, <yellow>or they will control you.</yellow> Focus only on what is in your power, and <red>let go of the rest.</red>
script.title: Master Your Thoughts
